data.title: Coinbase CEO expects market structure bill markup ‘in a few weeks‘
data.description:
Brian Armstrong posted to social media late on a Wednesday saying Coinbase couldn't “support the bill as written,“ potentially leading to a postponement in consideration.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/coinbase-ceo-crypto-market-structure-bill-markup?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Baidu's ERNIE 5 AI Model Rises Up the Rankings—A Math Wiz That Beats OpenAI's GPT 5.1
data.description:
Baidu's ERNIE-5. 0-0110 ranks #8 globally on LMArena, becoming the only Chinese model in the top 10 while outperforming GPT-5. 1-High.
source: https://decrypt.co/354772/baidu-ernie-5-ai-model-rises-rankings-math-wiz-beats-gpt

data.title: Russia to require banks to report on client crypto transactions
data.description:
Russia’s monetary authority intends to oblige commercial banks to provide detailed reports on their customers’ transactions related to cryptocurrency. The policy is part of new reporting requirements that concern all cross-border transfers made by Russians and comes ahead of the full regulation of the crypto market planned for this year. Bank of Russia wants to […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/russia-to-require-banks-to-report-on-client-crypto-transactions/

data.title: Retail investors are going crazy for silver
data.description:
In just the last 30 days, retail traders have shoved over $920 million into silver-linked ETFs. That’s the biggest ever. The two big names getting all the action are iShares Silver Trust (SLV) and ProShares Ultra Silver (AGQ). Every single day, more retail cash piles in. SLV has now had 169 straight sessions of inflows. […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/retail-investors-are-going-crazy-for-silver/

data.title: Donald Trump Confirms Arrest and Jailing of Venezuelan Attack Leaker
data.description:
The leaker enabled three Polymarket wallets to profit from betting on the arrest of Venezuelan President Nicolás Maduro.
source: https://cryptopotato.com/donald-trump-confirms-arrest-and-jailing-of-venezuelan-attack-leaker/

data.title: Short-Term Bitcoin Holders Take Profits as Price Pushes Higher
data.description:
Short-term Bitcoin holders remain highly reactive to recent price movements, with on-chain data showing a clear tendency to realize profits during the latest rebound. While the move higher can be classified as technical in nature, behavior among newer holders suggests caution rather than renewed conviction.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/short-term-bitcoin-holders-take-profits-as-price-pushes-higher/

data.title: Austan Dean Goolsbee says Trump’s attack on Fed autonomy will trigger higher inflation
data.description:
Austan Goolsbee, president of the Chicago Fed, said on Thursday that trying to weaken the Fed’s independence would bring inflation roaring back. “Anything that’s infringing or attacking the independence of the central bank is a mess,” Goolsbee said. “You’re going to get inflation come roaring back if you try to take away the independence of […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/goolsbee-on-trumps-attack-on-fed-autonomy/

data.title: Anonymous Addresses Transfer 105,800 SOL to Single Address
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, data from Arkham indicates that at approximately 04:06, three anonymous addresses, starting with FG1Wyok, FZUHsNi, and F7Bnd3, transferred a total of 105,800 SOL to another anonymous address beginning with 6MiL6B.

data.title: Artemis: Crypto cards carry over $1.5B in monthly payments
data.description:
Crypto cards expanded their market share, almost rivaling P2P stablecoin payments. VISA remains the leading partner for crypto cards, while Mastercard partners for exchange-based cards.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/artemis-crypto-cards-carry-over-1-5b-in-monthly-payments/
